title: PyFuRNAce Experimental Validation
author: Verstraeten, William
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This repository contains raw imaging, gel, plate reader, and AFM data for the experimental validation of the pyFuRNAce project (bioRxiv preprint doi:10.1101/2025.04.17.647389). Includes raw confocal images, uncropped gel images, AFM raw data, and plate reader measurements. Intended to enable reproducibility of all quantitative results presented in the manuscript.
steps_raw: This repository contains raw imaging, gel, plate reader, and AFM data for the experimental validation of the pyFuRNAce project (bioRxiv preprint doi:10.1101/2025.04.17.647389). Includes raw confocal images, uncropped gel images, AFM raw data, and plate reader measurements. Intended to enable reproducibility of all quantitative results presented in the manuscript.
